name: label
description: Label text displayed above the input field.

name: placeholder
description: Placeholder text shown when the field is empty.

name: helperText
description: Helper text displayed below the input field.

name: variant
description: Controls the visual style of the input field.

name: status
description: Indicates the validation state of the field.

name: multiline
description: When true, renders a textarea instead of an input.

name: rows
description: When multiline is true, sets the default height (number of rows) of the textarea.

name: fullWidth
description: When true, the field fills the full width of its parent container.

name: required
description: Marks the field as required for form validation.
